title: Touchup README.md and fix whitespace issues
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

README.md had a lingering whitespace issues.  This will (hopefully) fix that and touches up a few other nits.

comments.body: Just like #230, Error on Red Hat CI without any logs/errors.   Looks like the bot doesn't like me, can someone kick it please?
Still seeing gitvalidation errors - whitespace errors in 0aa2459b2de53bd3b46a1b34aaebc89116fdb040
Finally all green test buttons.  @mheon @baude @rhatdan sorry about the headaches, thanks for the help in fixing, and PTAL!  This should fix up the test errors plaguing others.
Going to merge to clean up gitvalidation issues

:pushpin: Commit 2ae079f has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon 2ae079f6a6f5290317c5be986f4c5c056de13f19 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
